title: Signal Decay Monitor & Freshness Dashboard
summary: Build a scheduled weekly process that computes rolling IC for each of Decifer's 9 signal dimensions over the trailing 60-trade window, and flags any dimension where IC has dropped below 0.02 (near-zero predictive power) or gone negative. US equity momentum signals are shown to decay ~60% within 10 months at 5.6% annually — without monitoring, Decifer could be running degraded signals for months before noticing in P&L. This is a defensive, high-leverage feature.
